title: ETH - impossible to send ERC-20 tokens (with ETH in the balance)

actions.value:
Thanks for reaching out.

Are you trying to send tokens to a custodial service?

It is possible that custodial services like exchanges require now higher fees to be paid, even for receiving ERC-20 token and not only for sending.


In this case, I suggest that you try a custom fee:

On the Slide to confirm screen, tap the fee section, tap Custom, set the gas limit to 200'000 and the Gwei at the Standard value you can see here https://ethgasstation.info/ .


Now Save, go back and check the transaction fees. If you are ok with them, just Slide to confirm.
Your transaction should be accepted.

Please let me know if you have any additional questions or concerns.

raw_title: ETH - impossible to send ERC-20 tokens (with ETH in the balance)
